title: Batteries
discoveryHint: You need to discover electronics first.

sections.text: Batteries store EU for portable use and for power buffering. They come in cadmium, lithium, and sodium chemistries at various tiers. Charge them in a Battery Buffer or Charger.

Battery Buffers accept batteries and output stored energy to the network. A Battery Buffer with multiple batteries provides multiple amps, which is essential for powering multiblocks that need more than 1A.
